description:
Fifty years ago, the martial arts world was suddenly invaded by the “Hun Dun”. Murong Qiong established the Demon Sect to resist it, but they couldn’t manage to win despite arduous battles. The Divine Messenger Yi Zhihua descended and taught everyone the cultivation method of demonization, and they finally managed to defeat the Hun Dun. However, after the Divine Messenger left, the cultivation method went out of control as it spread in the martial arts world. Disappointed, Murong Qiong retired and his subordinate Yu Huabing seized the power, improved the cultivation method, and created an era of Punk True Qi, making the martial arts world thrive. But the price of prosperity was that all the cultivators became “Shang Gong fanatics”. Dongfang Sheng, harboring an idealistic and sincere aspiration, found Murong Qiong secluded in the Westward Restaurant. He hoped that Murong Qiong would assist in restoring the glory of the martial arts world.The comical story thus began...

(Source: BilibiliTV)
